final:
// // This module categorizes WiFi signal strength into weak, moderate, and strong based on a scale of 0 to 255.
module wifi_signal_indicator (
    input wire clk,
    input wire [7:0] signal_strength,
    output reg [2:0] strength_category
);
    
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (signal_strength <= 84) begin
            strength_category <= 3'b000; // weak
        end else if (signal_strength <= 169) begin
            strength_category <= 3'b001; // moderate
        end else begin
            strength_category <= 3'b010; // strong
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module categorizes WiFi signal strength into weak, moderate, and strong based on a scale of 0 to 255.
